Moryn Tyrell is a knight from House Tyrell. The uncle of Mace Tyrell, Lord of Highgarden, Moryn is the Lord Commander of the City Watch of Oldtown.[1]

Recent Events[ ]

A Feast for Crows[ ]

Pate considers attacking Moryn's son, Leo the Lazy, but stops because of Leo's family connections.[3]
